---
title: "White Ribbon"
subtitle: "Essays on virtual states and diasporas"
lang: en
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
  feed: true
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.intro}
White Ribbon publishes essays on the nominal and actual democratic institutions 
of emigration, on the conditions and prospects of national diasporas in exile. 
The aim of this writing is to bring about systemic change and a new quality 
of life for Belarusians abroad.

:::
